description_long: This is a dark green glass bottle with a long, slender neck and a slightly wider base, typical of wine or champagne bottles. The front features a cream-colored label with cursive black writing and a prominent red wax seal or emblem above the label, giving it a premium or celebratory appearance. The bottle is sealed with a dark cap, possibly a cork covered by foil, which is common for sparkling beverages. The label wraps partially around the bottle, with the back and sides mostly unadorned except for the continuation of the label. The surface appears smooth and glossy, reflecting light subtly. There are no visible signs of damage, and the bottle looks clean and intact.
description: A dark green, glossy glass bottle with a cream label, red wax seal, and a dark cap, resembling a wine or champagne bottle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cream label with cursive writing and a red wax seal prominently displayed.
description_view_1: Angled view showing the side of the bottle and the label wrapping around, with the red seal partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain dark green glass with only the edges of the label visible on either side.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, showing more of the label and a hint of the red seal.
attribute_label_or_branding: Cream-colored label with cursive black writing and a red wax seal on the front.
